description: Ed25519Signer::into_inner, EcdsaP256Signer::into_inner, and RsaPss2048Signer::into_inner all consume self and return an Arc<dyn SigningBackend>. Discarding the return value silently drops the backend reference, which is almost certainly a caller bug. Each method should be annotated #[must_use] (or #[must_use = "dropping the returned backend discards the Arc reference"]). Clippy's must_use_candidate lint would flag these.
title: into_inner() missing #[must_use] on all three signer types
